'''Seitia Prime''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Seitia system]], near [[Rhamalai]].

The [[Bellorin Medical Academy]] was located on Seitia Prime.<ref name="Rhamalai">{{JournalCite|13|The Occupation of Rhamalai}}</ref>
